title: anguina patara
side_effects: Anguina patara can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing gastrointestinal issues, including diarrhea and nausea, due to its high concentration of saponins. In some cases, excessive consumption of the plant may also lead to allergic reactions, such as skin rashes and respiratory problems. Overuse of Anguina patara can also disrupt the body's natural hormone balance, potentially causing irregular menstrual cycles in women and hormonal imbalances in men. Furthermore, consuming large quantities of the plant can lead to interactions with prescription medications, exacerbating underlying health conditions.
